summary: Iteration 5 covers Gift Card Redemption flow, Pilot Launch Checklist, and 2 new Boss Genie tools (launch_readiness, list_pending_giftcards). Backend: 18/18 pytest tests pass (test_giftcard_launch.py). Frontend: Admin Launch Checklist widget renders correctly with banner 'LAUNCH WITH CAUTION' (5 pass / 1 warn / 0 fail), all 6 lc-row-* keys present, sidebar tabs admin-tab-launch and admin-tab-giftcards work. User Redeem -> Gift Card -> Amazon -> email -> submit flow successfully debited credits 200 -> 175 via real /api/giftcard/request call (verified by visible balance in UI screenshot).

issues: 'How Redemption Works' card copy is leftover from credit-transfer/deposit flow — says 'Credits are loaded to your game account' and 'Your universal game login will be used for the selected platform'. For a gift-card request (which gets emailed to the recipient_email), copy should say 'An admin will email the gift card code to the recipient'.

'SELECT GAME PLATFORM' dropdown is shown on the gift card request form. game_id is Optional in backend payload — having a required-looking platform selector here is confusing UX for gift-card redemptions. Consider hiding it on the gift-card path.

After successful submit the amount input clears but no visible success toast/confirmation was rendered on the page (balance silently dropped 200 -> 175). Recommend a confirmation toast like 'Gift card request submitted — check your email when admin approves'.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/giftcard/catalog returns exactly 8 brands with correct min/max (amazon max=500, spotify max=100)
Backend: POST /api/giftcard/request success — debits credits, creates gift_card_redemptions doc, status=pending, returns rid+brand+amount
Backend: POST /api/giftcard/request returns 400 on insufficient credits ('Insufficient game credits.')
Backend: POST /api/giftcard/request returns 400 on unsupported brand
Backend: POST /api/giftcard/request returns 400 when amount > brand max (Amazon 600, Spotify 150)
Backend: POST /api/giftcard/request returns 503 when feature flag giftcard_redemption_enabled=false (toggled via /api/ext/compliance/admin/feature-flags)
Backend: GET /api/giftcard/my-requests redacts code field on listing
Backend: GET /api/giftcard/my-requests/{rid} returns code=None while pending
Backend: GET /api/ext/giftcard/admin/pending requires admin (non-admin gets 403), returns only pending docs
Backend: POST /api/ext/giftcard/admin/fulfill/{rid} sets status=fulfilled and code becomes visible to user via /api/giftcard/my-requests/{rid}
Backend: POST /api/ext/giftcard/admin/reject/{rid} sets status=rejected AND refunds amount_credits back to user.game_credits (verified before/after delta = +20)

Backend: GET /api/ext/launch-checklist requires admin, returns summary{ready,banner,passing,warning,failing,total} + exactly 6 checks (stripe, games, pool, alerts, compliance, redemption_path); banner is one of the 3 valid strings
Backend: POST /api/boss/chat with 'Are we launch-ready?' triggers launch_readiness tool in tool_trace and returns natural-language reply
Backend: POST /api/boss/chat with 'show me pending gift cards' triggers list_pending_giftcards tool
Backend: /game-logos/panda_master.svg, orion_stars.svg, game_vault.svg all return 200 with svg content

Frontend: /admin shows LaunchChecklist widget at top with data-testid=launch-checklist, lc-banner='LAUNCH WITH CAUTION', lc-refresh-btn present, 6 rows lc-row-{stripe,games,pool,alerts,compliance,redemption_path}
Frontend: Sidebar has admin-tab-launch and admin-tab-giftcards; clicking each navigates to LaunchChecklist page and AdminGiftCards queue respectively
Frontend: User Redeem tab -> payout-tile-giftcard -> giftcard-amazon -> giftcard-email-input -> redeem-submit successfully calls real backend (verified by credits dropping from 200 to 175)
Frontend: No JS errors on admin dashboard or Redeem tab (only benign 401s from optional polling endpoints)
action_items: (Polish) Update RedeemTab gift-card 'How Redemption Works' copy — currently says credits get loaded to game account; for gift cards it should explain admin will email the code to the recipient.
(Polish) Hide or de-emphasize the 'SELECT GAME PLATFORM' dropdown on the gift-card branch (game_id is optional in the backend; it's confusing here).

(Polish) Show a success toast / confirmation after gift-card submit so user knows the request was accepted (currently the form silently resets and the only visible feedback is the credit balance ticking down).
critical_code_review_comments: gift_cards.py: KYC threshold check uses raise HTTPException with 402 status containing dict detail — most clients/middleware expect a string detail. Consider standardizing detail to a string with a separate code field.
gift_cards.py: ObjectId conversion duplicated in giftcard_request and admin_reject — could be extracted to a helper.

gift_cards.py: Email sending after fulfill is best-effort; if EmailService is misconfigured the user only sees the code in-app, no email — make sure UI clearly surfaces the code copy/clipboard action.
boss_genie.py at 523 lines is approaching the 700-line file-size threshold — consider splitting tool definitions into a separate module before adding more tools.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@sugarcitysweeps.com / SugarCity2024! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Test users created with random uitest_*@test.com and gctest_*@test.com prefixes; credits seeded via mongosh updates to db.users.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users via POST /api/auth/register and credited them to 200/300 game_credits via mongosh for redemption testing. Several gift_card_redemptions docs in pending/fulfilled/rejected states were created and one admin_alert resolved as a side effect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 features (gift-card redemption, launch checklist, 2 new Boss tools) are fully working backend+frontend. The feature-flag toggle endpoint lives at /api/ext/compliance/admin/feature-flags (PATCH with {key, value}). Boss Genie /api/boss/chat costs LLM tokens — keep tests <=2 prompts. UI copy on the gift-card form still has leftover credit-transfer language; non-blocking but should be polished before launch.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs blocking launch. Three minor UX polish items noted above.
